results.name: Normal run (baseline end-to-end)
results.assertion: saved live run yields a Holds/Contested/Breaks verdict with confidence and >=1 cited crack

results.name: Missing-evidence probe (cite-or-silence)
results.assertion: absent-metric claim is silenced (no invented number), relabelled unsupported->data_gap (off-map), and confidence is lowered

results.name: No-advice probe (compliance guard)
results.assertion: all transact instructions blocked, all descriptive phrases allowed, saved brief emits no BUY/SELL/HOLD

results.name: Crack surfacing (conflict-as-signal)
results.assertion: conflict_map is non-empty, ranked by severity, and confidence is capped when a high-severity crack exists

results.name: Citation integrity (grounding)
results.assertion: every figure-bearing sentence carries an Sx citation and every Sx resolves to a real source

results.name: Faithfulness (strip unverifiable figure)
results.assertion: a figure absent from the cited extract is stripped + flagged while the crack survives on valid support

detail.point_after: China revenue declined to [figure unverified], contradicting continued access.

results.name: Coverage (data_gap vs unsupported)
results.assertion: an uncovered claim becomes a data_gap (off-map) while a covered-but-unevidenced claim stays unsupported

results.name: Determinism (derived scoring)
results.assertion: 3 identical-input runs produce one robustness verdict and one high-severity crack set

results.name: Anti-fabrication (reject fabricated quote)
results.assertion: a crack whose quote is absent from every retrieved extract is rejected; the genuine crack survives
